description: Project-specific quality gates. Replace placeholder commands during bootstrap or mark gates not-applicable/deferred with a concrete rationale.

profiles.fast: Runs on every implementation PR and during normal agent iteration.
profiles.full: Runs before merge/release candidates and after verify:fast.
profiles.release: Runs for release candidates when release support is enabled.
profiles.deploy: Runs against a deployed target when deployment verification is available.

gates.rationale: Prevent new syntax, style, unused-code, and static-analysis debt.
Prove typed contracts across changed code.
Protect focused behavior and regression coverage.
Prove the production artifact can compile/package.
Replace with the project integration/API test command once an integration harness exists.
No database migration surface has been adopted yet; docs/generated/db-schema.md records the placeholder schema state.
No browser-run frontend surface has been adopted yet.
Replace with the project dependency/static security audit command once dependencies are installed.
Verify release completeness, evidence, and mapping before release promotion.
Replace with the project deployment health check once a deployment target exists.
